title: Select Runtime Directories
subtitle: Adjust the configuration and app-data directories when needed
app_data_placeholder: Enter or select application data directory...
default_hint: Enter absolute paths directly, or pick one of the absolute presets below.
no_config_warning: If you do not specify directories manually, the app will use platform defaults and create the configuration file only when needed.
path_required: Please enter configuration and application data directories
file_not_exist: Runtime directories are unavailable or not accessible.
